mechanics.excerpt: Many devices have been developed t0 reduce the effect of recoil; with varying degrees of success_ One of the most common kinds of recoil compensation gas-vent system that vents the weapon barrel gases at specific vector t0 counter barrel climb_ Support weapons can benefit from gyroscopic harness mounts_ In game terms, if wcapon equipped with any recoil com pensation, it increases the cost ad weight of the weapon by 10 percent; but the weapon' recoil rating increased Dy one point.
